mapper.select: SELECT id, username, nickname FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY nickname

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.avatar, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.status, u.is_builtin, u.created_at FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0
